title: JustLeveling Fork x IronSpell
description: Just Leveling Fork x IronSpell is a crossover mod between Just Leveling and Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks.
body:
**Just Leveling Fork x IronSpell** is a crossover mod between **Just Leveling Fork** and **Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks**. This mod introduces four new skills.

### New Skills Overview:

- **Mana Spring**
  - **Description:** Increases your maximum mana, allowing you to store more mana and cast more powerful spells.

- **Quickly Launch**
  - **Description:** Reduces the cooldown time of all spells and skills, enabling you to use them more frequently and maintain high output in battles.

- **Echo Chant**
  - **Description:** Shortens casting time, allowing you to cast spells faster and gain an edge in fast-paced combat.

- **Blood Mana**
  - **Description:** Automatically triggers an Instant Mana potion effect when your mana falls below certain thresholds (20%, 40%, 60%), restoring some mana. This skill has a cooldown of 200 ticks to ensure continuous support during crucial moments.
![skill](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d63d6d6b94609f78b2fc9089fb12b037ae8abf9.png)
